title: Evangelions tidbits of wisdom
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion's tidbits of wisdom             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Sun Dec 23, 2007 11:31 pm Ok guys, throughout the show, i know there are some insightful statements, especially in the later episodes ["Love is just two adults licking each others wounds" comes to mind]. I would prefer them to be dissociated from the story or the characters. thanks -IRen

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Dec 23, 2007 11:38 pm "I mustn't run away."

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Dec 24, 2007 12:01 am I know it isn't what you want, but I love this exchange: Kaji: You shouldn't be throwing up at your age. Misato: Sorry I'm that age. Who can't relate to having moments where you desperately don't want to conform to the standards of what those around you expect from you with regards to your age/maturity and social status/context?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Dec 24, 2007 12:26 am I swear there is a thread like this in Chit-Chat somewhere......

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Mon Dec 24, 2007 3:23 pm There was.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Dec 25, 2007 12:49 am Reichu wrote: I swear there is a thread like this in Chit-Chat somewhere......

[]:             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Thu Dec 27, 2007 11:46 pm any ideas people? or link to this phantom thread?

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Fri Dec 28, 2007 2:37 am Methinks it was this. http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=105
